nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Entry-point document for a vendored Claude Code agent skill on building Remotion-based video SaaS apps; links out to framework selection, Player embedding, and rendering-strategy guides, plus pointers for using Remotion with Vue, Angular, and Svelte. This is bundled third-party skill reference material, not versus-engine's own source.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Claude Code agent-skill frontmatter (description/metadata tags) rather than being a typical project README.

nodes.name: framework.md
nodes.summary: Reference list of official Remotion SaaS/video-app starter templates (Next.js App Router with/without Tailwind, Next.js Pages Router, Vercel Sandbox, React Router 7, Express render server) with each template's default rendering backend, to help choose a starting framework for a Remotion app.

nodes.name: player.md
nodes.summary: Guide for embedding an interactive Remotion video preview in a React app via the `<Player>` component from `@remotion/player`, including a usage code sample and notes on syncing dynamic metadata with Player props.
nodes.languageNotes: Contains a minimal TSX code sample demonstrating <Player> composition props (component, durationInFrames, compositionWidth/Height, fps, controls).

nodes.name: rendering.md
nodes.summary: Comparison of programmatic Remotion rendering options — plain Node.js SSR, Remotion Lambda, Vercel, GitHub Actions, Azure Container Apps, and Cloudflare Containers — with a detailed step-by-step checklist for setting up Remotion Lambda (IAM roles, credentials, deploying the function and site, quota checks).
nodes.languageNotes: Longest and most structured doc in this skill bundle, with 8 H2/H3 sections including a numbered operational runbook for AWS Lambda setup.
